concerns.text: T002 (Initialize Python project with requirements.txt) precedes T004 (Create requirements.txt with pinned versions). T004 must come before T002, or T002 should not reference requirements.txt creation.

T005 and T024 both create run_pipeline.sh. T005 creates it with memory monitoring; T024 creates it with orchestration. This is a file conflict - T024 should update T005's script, not create a new one.
T014 marked [P] but creates load_cascade() in code/pipeline/utils.py. T006 also creates utils.py with logging infrastructure. Same-file conflict makes T014 not parallel-safe.
T031 marked [P] but implements LOUOCV in code/models/hierarchical_model.py. T021 creates hierarchical_model.py. Same-file conflict makes T031 not parallel-safe.
T007 (data-model.md) and T008 (contracts/) should be explicitly ordered before T014-T027. While Phase 2 precedes Phase 3, the dependency should be explicit in task descriptions.
